unresolved: src/main/java/com/fasterxml/jackson/databind/util/TokenBuffer.java:TokenBuffer.deserialize — text-identical method name/signature but on an unrelated class (does not implement JsonDeserializer); excluded as out-of-scope unless the change also targets this coincidental overload.

Deserializers registered externally via SPI/modules in third-party code outside this repository (e.g. jackson-datatype-* modules) that override JsonDeserializer.deserialize(JsonParser,DeserializationContext) are out of scope of this repo but would also need to change; not enumerable from within jackson-databind alone.

Reflection/dynamic dispatch: deserializers resolved via SimpleModule.addDeserializer, @JsonDeserialize(using=...), or Deserializers/BeanDeserializerModifier SPI hooks are invoked polymorphically through the JsonDeserializer interface at runtime (already covered structurally by the JsonDeserializer.deserialize declaration + DeserializationContext.readValue/readPropertyValue entry points), so no additional distinct call sites are expected beyond those listed, but this can't be proven exhaustively for reflectively-loaded custom deserializers.
